summary: Iteration 146: Ops KPIs, Auto-Actions, and Notification Routing features fully verified. All 21 backend tests passed (ops-kpis endpoint, auto-actions endpoint, drift-alerts enhanced, notification routing matrix, auto-action guardrails). All 10 frontend elements verified (channel-health-block, deploy-health-block, drift-alert-panel, kpi-dashboard, drift-evaluate-btn, ops-refresh, kpi-sync-success, kpi-mttr, kpi-push-sla, kpi-auto-heal). Button interactions working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor recharts sizing issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend drift_alerting.py correctly implements NOTIFICATION_ROUTING matrix: warning→dashboard only, critical→dashboard+webhook, severe→dashboard+webhook+escalation+auto-action
Backend auto_actions.py correctly implements guardrails: 15-min cooldown, eligibility check, timeline logging, failure alerts
Backend dashboard_router.py correctly exposes /api/ops/dashboard/ops-kpis with period_hours, calculated_at, drift_alerts, auto_actions, drift_trend, field_kpis
Backend dashboard_router.py correctly exposes /api/ops/dashboard/auto-actions with actions list and count
Frontend UnifiedOpsView.jsx correctly implements restructured layout: TOP=ChannelHealthBlock+DeployHealthBlock, MIDDLE=DriftAlertPanel, BOTTOM=KpiDashboard
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 10 elements verified, all interactions working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146 verified ops-kpis, auto-actions, and notification routing. Key endpoints: GET /api/ops/dashboard/ops-kpis (returns period_hours, calculated_at, drift_alerts, auto_actions, drift_trend, field_kpis), GET /api/ops/dashboard/auto-actions (returns actions list with count). Frontend Unified Ops View at /control-plane under Ops Merkezi tab shows: TOP=ChannelHealthBlock+DeployHealthBlock, MIDDLE=DriftAlertPanel with TEMIZ status, BOTTOM=KpiDashboard with Sync Success, MTTR, Push SLA, Auto-Heal KPIs. Webhook URLs (ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL, ESCALATION_WEBHOOK_URL) are not configured - notification routing is no-op for webhooks. Navigation: Kanallar menu > Control Plane.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/ops-kpis.returns: {period_hours, calculated_at, drift_alerts: {active_count, by_severity, highest_severity}, auto_actions: {total, success, failed, success_rate}, drift_trend: [], field_kpis: {sync_success, mttr_hours, drift_reduction, push_sla_compliance}}

POST /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/eva.returns: {evaluated, tenant_id, evaluated_at, evidence, alignment_status, freshness, alerts_fired}

frontend_elements.channel-health-block: PASS - data-testid exists, shows HIZALI status with 5 connectors
frontend_elements.deploy-health-block: PASS - data-testid exists, shows 'Deploy verisi yok'
frontend_elements.drift-alert-panel: PASS - data-testid exists, shows TEMIZ status
frontend_elements.kpi-dashboard: PASS - data-testid exists, shows all KPI values
frontend_elements.drift-evaluate-btn: PASS - data-testid exists, clickable, triggers evaluation and shows toast
frontend_elements.ops-refresh: PASS - data-testid exists, clickable, refreshes data

auto_action_guardrails.failure_alerts: Verified - fires alert on action failure

mocked_api_note: Webhook URLs (ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL, ESCALATION_WEBHOOK_URL) are not set - notification routing is no-op for webhooks. Auto-action calls real ReconciliationEngine.
